title: Infosys and Intel Expand Strategic Collaboration for Enterprise AI Deployments
detailed_summary: Infosys and Intel announced the next phase of their strategic collaboration to help enterprises move AI from pilots to production at scale. The collaboration combines Infosys Topaz Fabric, described as a purpose-built agentic services suite and multi-layer AI fabric, with Intel's compute platforms across Intel Xeon processors, Intel Gaudi AI accelerators, and Intel AI PCs. The effort focuses on open standards across the edge-to-cloud stack, production-ready AI deployments, optimized performance, security, cost efficiency, and measurable enterprise outcomes for use cases including IT operations, developer productivity, and automation workflows across industries.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and Intel announced the next phase of their strategic collaboration to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production at scale.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

key_facts.fact: The expanded collaboration brings together Intel's high-performance, energy-efficient compute platforms and Infosys Topaz Fabric.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

key_facts.fact: Infosys Topaz Fabric is described as a purpose-built agentic services suite and multi-layer AI fabric that unifies infrastructure, models, data, applications, and workflows into a composable, agent-ready ecosystem.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

key_facts.fact: Infosys and Intel are co-innovating on the design, development, optimization, and benchmarking of AI workloads across Intel® Xeon® processors, Intel® Gaudi® AI accelerators, and Intel® AI PCs.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

key_facts.fact: The collaboration emphasizes right-sized AI architectures that balance performance, security, and total cost of ownership for mission-critical use cases including IT operations, developer productivity, and automation workflows across industries.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

key_facts.fact: The combined solution supports AI agents that can access enterprise data, coordinate tasks, and operate with appropriate controls across complex and regulated environments powered by Intel's compute platforms.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys and Intel expanded their strategic collaboration to advance open standards across the edge-to-cloud stack and accelerate scalable, secure, and cost-efficient enterprise AI deployments using Infosys Topaz Fabric and Intel compute platforms.
partnerships_or_deals.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally
